headline: Assessing Enphase Energy (ENPH) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum Shift
summary: Setting the scene for Enphase Energy Enphase Energy (ENPH) has drawn fresh attention after recent share price moves, with the stock showing a mix of monthly softness and stronger past 3 months and year to date returns that investors are reassessing. See our latest analysis for Enphase Energy. The recent 1 day share price return of 6.68% and 90 day share price return of 32.94% sit against a 1 year total shareholder return decline of 28.34%, which indicates improving short term momentum after a...
